title: HTML Basics Quiz
description: Test your knowledge of HTML basics

questions.explanation: HTML stands for HyperText Markup Language, the standard markup language for creating web pages.

questions.text: Which tag is used to create a paragraph?
questions.explanation:
The

tag is used to create a paragraph in HTML.

questions.text: What is the correct way to link a CSS file?
questions.explanation: The correct way is to use <link rel='stylesheet' href='style.css'> in the <head> section.

questions.text: Which tag is used for the largest heading?
questions.explanation: The <h1> tag represents the largest heading level in HTML.

questions.text: What is the correct syntax for an image tag?
questions.explanation: The tag with src and alt attributes is the correct syntax for embedding images.

title: React Hooks Quiz
description: Test your understanding of React hooks

questions.text: What hook is used to manage component state?
questions.explanation: useState is the hook used to add state to functional components.

questions.text: Which hook runs after the component renders?
questions.explanation: useEffect runs after the component renders and is used for side effects.

questions.text: What is the purpose of the dependency array in useEffect?
options: To specify which values to listen for changes
questions.explanation: The dependency array specifies which values trigger the effect, helping control when the effect runs.
